title: CIT - Champions of Innovation and Time
body:
#  Champions of Innovation & Time 
 

 

### What Can You Do With This Pack?
 

 

This Pack was designed with Technology, Exploration and the TARDIS in mind. The player (You) will be able to design technical marvels using Create and Ad Astra, dabble in the arts of magic with Botania, explore your way through a world full of old and new structures to make your home with Village improvements and world generation, and discover the wonders of expansive Travel into the universe using the Adventures in Time Mod. This Pack has purposely been moved to fabric to allow for smoother running for both single player and the server, and also has been designed to give a variety of options for the player to enjoy their time playing. So download it now, and find out what lies in store for yourself! More information on the pack below. 

 

 

 

### The Modpack -
 

 

This Modpack is taking a slightly different route this time, with the use of the Adventures in Time mod to bring us the Tardis in 1.20. This change may be unexpected and different, but it was chosen to both move us forward to more up to date versions of the game, but also to move to Fabric. 

 

 

We hope though that the new pack will be enjoyable to new and old players alike, especially with the fact we now have trains! But we do thank all who have offered ideas and suggestions to how we could improve. 

 

 

### The CIT Server -
 

 

This new server will greatly focus around the Exploring, but also Technology and a sprinkling of magic. The TARDIS, will allow you to explore even more, and achieve even more aswell. It is designed to offer carried opportunities, with more things to do than getting a TARDIS, but the mainstay of a TARDIS is there for those who want that added side of adventure into the world. 

 

 

We have brought in the new create currency system, to alow for shops and will make the train line more enjoyable. 

 

 

To keep to our theme for names and server IP addresses, we went with the below server ip address:

 

 

**_cit.rnshosting.xyz_**

 

 

We have designed a spawn for the server, it will be mainly used as a central hub for the world where we could host events, pop up any trade stores or anything of the like. We hope that you get a chance to have a look around before you head off exploring! 

 

 

Hosted proudly by RNS Hosting (https://www.rnshosting.xyz)

 

 

### Rasttny Staff Team -

 

 

You may very well meet us on the server, but at least we can let you know our names, below is a list of all the staff on the team:

 

 

gabriele27 - Mod

 

 

Halex - Mod

 

 

DoctorSaraHunter199 - Mod

 

 

NathanB - Mod

 

 

DizzyBright - Admin

 

 

DangerousOnes - Head Admin

 

 

Schwift_ - Senior Head Admin

 

 

Destroyer021620 - Senior Head Admin

 

 

Rasttny - Owner

 

 

Honourable Mentions:
 

 

We also would like to mention a couple of staff that have been a big part of the team, with BellatorHD, Taaank, WizeWizzard, Grain_ and _Noach05 who helped a huge amount during their times as Staff. 

 

 

### Conclusion -
 

 

We really hope that you enjoy both the modpack, and the server that we have designed for you all! And we hope that, even with some changed and updates you all can enjoy the pack! 

 

 

Thank you all for being such a great community, and welcome to any new ones who want to hop on the bandwagon!

 

 

### Notes -
 

 

If you wish to apply for the Rasttny Staff Team, then feel free to fill out this form below. 

 

 

https://forms.gle/pD28NKa9WiFN5gNk6

 

 

To keep the most up-to-date on Server Events, Modpack updates, or Server welfare in general, please feel free to join us on our Discord. An invite to it is below. 

 

 

https://discord.gg/VDT4PbwX2c

 

 

If you are enjoying the Modpack/Server please consider donating to help show your support of the Staff's effort and keep to the Server going! (Donations are not mandatory and are completely optional)

 

 

https://tinyurl.com/rasttnyserver
